title: ANALYSIS OF TECHNOLOGICAL PROCESSES OF OBTAINING OIL FROM PLUM SEEDS BY PRESSING AND EXTRACTION
author: Davlyatov, Azizbek Abdikasimovich
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Analysis of pressing and extraction methods in the development of oil extraction technology from fruit seeds, determination of the efficiency of the pressing device in extracting oil. Also, a comparison of the amount of oil in the crushed released as a result of pressing and the amount of oil obtained by pressing. In our research work, attention is paid to the issues of determining the factors influencing the environment in oil extraction processes in both cases.
steps_raw: Analysis of pressing and extraction methods in the development of oil extraction technology from fruit seeds, determination of the efficiency of the pressing device in extracting oil. Also, a comparison of the amount of oil in the crushed released as a result of pressing and the amount of oil obtained by pressing. In our research work, attention is paid to the issues of determining the factors influencing the environment in oil extraction processes in both cases.
keywords: Plum kernel, heater, solvent, cotton, screw press, soxhlet, crucible, filter paper, rotary evaporator, extraction device, sieves, porcelain mortar, water bath, Akita JP-8000 equipment.
